tweets.text:
Bonjour from the #Paris24 Olympics and Paralympics! 🇫🇷🏅

@USEmbassyFrance quizzed fans about the Olympics and how we are supporting @TeamUSA and U.S. travelers during the games. https://t.co/lTOulXdiJQ

Paraclimbing will be a new sport during the #LA28 Paralympics. As @TeamUSA athletes train for the next games, they’re proving the inclusive power of sports — and that we all belong. #OneForAll https://t.co/RZrGDIuPD4

The world has a moral duty to hold Russian leaders accountable for forcibly taking Ukrainian children to Russia, putting them in re-education camps, and isolating them from their families. #TakenFromUkraine https://t.co/NYkthxSlJI

Tens of thousands of Ukraine’s children have been illegally deported or forcibly transferred into Russia and Belarus, where all trace of them is often lost. Here’s how the United States is working to ensure these crimes do not go unpunished. https://t.co/pwEjYQb2iw

#ThrowbackThursday to @SecBlinken talking about the important work of @StateDeptDSS special agents around the world and visits our training facility on our Walks With Tony series. https://t.co/BdjMsWMfcd

As the 2024 #ParisParalympics begin, @StateDeptDSS continues their critical work with French authorities in ensuring a safe and secure games. We recognize our colleagues for their role in protecting @TeamUSA athletes so they can focus on the competition. #OneForAll https://t.co/7s4Rk6TU4W

The @StateDeptDSS team, which includes our canine colleagues, protects State Department staff and buildings worldwide. And Pedro, a 5-year-old Dutch Shepherd, is a key member of our security team, working tirelessly to help keep us safe. https://t.co/yoJmE5oiUB
As the #Paris2024 @Paralympics opening ceremony takes place, we support @TeamUSA Paralympic hopefuls! #OneForAll https://t.co/87zyp2Y1fT

As the #Paris2024 Paralympic Games open, we join fans around the world in cheering on the athletes, especially the 220 @TeamUSA Paralympians competing in all 22 summer games sports. Here are a few who dreamed big and now are on the world’s largest stage. https://t.co/bYVEiYPdhV

Ahead of this week’s @Paralympics, #TeamUSA Paralympian Oksana Masters speaks about Ukrainian and American athletes supporting one another. The Olympic and Paralympic Games create positive impact for global communities through peaceful competition. #OneForAll https://t.co/0pAWGTaHa4

Everyone deserves safe and clean water. The U.S. is working with countries and organizations on water security issues, including conservation and management of freshwater resources at home and around the world, so everyone has access to this necessity of life. https://t.co/ZT7qysUHnM

The voices and ideas of youth are essential to tackling the climate crisis. @SecBlinken and climate influencers Yi Jun and Kong Man Jing discuss how we need to continue to work together to address this global crisis during a visit to Singapore’s Botanic Gardens. https://t.co/4HOGD1JLVF

“Water is the source of life, and it nurtures and sustains livelihoods and civilizations.” - @SecBlinken

All people deserve secure and sustainable access to safe water. #WorldWaterWeek https://t.co/WmKpKITZBK

This week at State, @SecBlinken travels to Israel, Egypt, and Qatar in ongoing efforts to reach a ceasefire in Gaza and the release of hostages. @DepSecStateMR strengthens ties with Nepal and India. And we celebrate Ukraine’s Independence Day.
.@SecBlinken speaks to the press in Doha, providing an update on his trip to the region and U.S. efforts to reach an agreement on a ceasefire deal in Gaza. https://t.co/BSO6sqlwCo

America’s National Parks are a visual journey, so its only fitting that America’s vintage posters were too. Checkout the artwork from a pre-World War II campaign “See America” on @ShareAmerica. https://t.co/nINxl6RFG9

Visitors from all over the world enjoy U.S. national parks every year. As the @NatlParkService celebrates 108 years, we share tips from park rangers on how to make the most of your trip. https://t.co/H6e1Yk1ZTm
On Ukraine’s Independence Day, we celebrate the people of Ukraine’s commitment to freedom and democracy and the rich cultural heritage that defines them as Ukrainian. https://t.co/Aj76rJDt2y
Ukrainians Are Rebuilding, Courageous, Unwavering, Independent. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/0H8Dk7HsKI

Today the world celebrates the day 33 years ago when Ukraine restored its independence and rejected Soviet rule. Today Ukrainians remain committed to their independence despite Russia’s war of aggression. https://t.co/Kl4y9t0GHE

Ukraine’s Independence Day is a reminder of the Ukrainian people’s’ commitment to freedom and liberty. The United States and our @G7 partners stand #UnitedWithUkraine. 🇨🇦 🇫🇷 🇩🇪 🇮🇹 🇯🇵 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 https://t.co/rDl4G1GNS7

Today is the Day of the National Flag in Ukraine — a symbol of hope, resistance, and sacrifice. 🇺🇦 It flies over Ukrainian cities fighting Russia’s aggression, is seen around the world in support of Ukraine, and represents an independent and free Ukraine. #SlavaUkraini https://t.co/KuLHKsB9Nw

More than a million Americans claim Ukrainian ancestry. As the Kremlin attempts to erase and deny Ukrainian identity, communities around the U.S. and the world celebrate the rich culture and long history of Ukraine. We are all #UnitedWithUkraine. Slava Ukraini. https://t.co/4YikkbfLF5

Ukraine's flag is a symbol of bravery, unity, and possibility. A symbol of an independent Ukraine and free Ukrainians. We stand with Ukraine on this Day of the National Flag and every day. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/e9qSpT915m
When each person is respected for their beliefs, they are more empowered to reach their full potential, which in turn lifts entire communities and societies. — @SecBlinken https://t.co/CiXkSw6IZa
.@SecBlinken speaks to the press in Doha, providing an update on his trip to the region and U.S. efforts to reach an agreement on a ceasefire deal in Gaza. https://t.co/ZRH7nNYokl

.@SecBlinken is in Israel today to reaffirm the United States’ commitment to Israel’s security, to prevent the conflict from spreading, and to bring an agreement for a ceasefire deal in Gaza and the release of hostages across the finish line. https://t.co/95s1BbXxHT

The United States will continue our efforts every single day to secure a ceasefire in Gaza, to get hostages home, and to put Israelis and Palestinians alike on the path to more durable peace and security. https://t.co/itm4KVMIzv

To prevent a climate catastrophe and adapt to the growing effects of climate change, we need resilient supply chains to produce clean energy technologies—from wind turbines to batteries. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/Z0LxtLhwd6

The United States has made historic investments in clean energy. We expect to reach 100% clean electricity by 2035, and are helping other countries reach their own clean energy goals. https://t.co/T0QOIB2Jxj

We know that climate change has impacted food insecurity. It is something that we feel every day as we look at the patterns of heat across the globe, the patterns of flooding, intensified storms. We absolutely have to work together to address these issues today. - @USAmbUN https://t.co/kGw5lKBJcu
Follow along with @DepSecStateMR Verma as he deepens our relations with Nepal and India on his travels to the region.
We asked four American journalists to explain why press freedom is essential for a thriving democracy. Here’s what they said. https://t.co/WGMqMKptiy
This has been the Kremlin’s war of aggression from the start against Ukraine — pure and simple. https://t.co/yOYMAJ8VSt

You may not know that we work regularly and collaboratively with the @DeptofDefense. Last week’s AUSMIN ministerial and meetings in the Indo-Pacific the prior week are example of how defense and diplomacy go hand-in-hand in creating a more secure world. https://t.co/IcqhFkWFc2

On @SecBlinken’s recent trip, we caught up with @USAmbMongolia Buangan for a look at a day in his life. Follow along as he shows us how we are deepening U.S.-Mongolia ties. Every day may not include taking in horse racing, wrestling, and archery, but this one did. https://t.co/IccPoP7iGO

The destination for the next Olympic and Paralympic Games will be Los Angeles, here in the United States. Did you know that this is the third time the star-studded city will host the summer games? We revisit a few  moments from previous games held here in 1932 and 1984. #LA28 https://t.co/GxDJsthcqr

At a visit to the Foreign Service Institute, @SecBlinken sat in on a class with locally employed staff and saw how teams train for passport emergencies.

More on how we prepare our diplomats in the latest #WalksWithTony: https://t.co/bBSdZw8aLY https://t.co/Nr4f1exrxl
This week at State, the United States hosts Australia for #AUSMIN, @SecBlinken calls for de-escalation in the Middle East, and we bid adieu to the #Paris2024 Summer Olympics. https://t.co/XIVL6YKn0K

Bonjour from the #Paris24 Olympics and Paralympics! 🇫🇷🏅

@USEmbassyFrance quizzed fans about the Olympics and how we are supporting @TeamUSA and U.S. travelers during the games. https://t.co/GdV4NfVRvs
The Olympic Games are here! We asked a few of our #TeamUSA athletes what they are looking forward to most outside of competing in their sports. It was croissants for the win. https://t.co/a7eFqiInmU

Even @TeamUSA athletes need passports for travel to sporting competitions around the world.

Ahead of the #Paris2024 games, we asked U.S. Olympians and Paralympians about this important travel requirement. Reminder: Check your passport’s expiration date and renew early! https://t.co/4VkzPKjxdQ

Today we celebrate #IndigenousPeoplesDay. The cultures, languages, and traditions of indigenous communities enrich our world. We stand with them in preserving their heritage and achieving self-determination. https://t.co/m66nHPSzzt

Millions of international travelers are at the #Paris2024 Olympic and Paralympic games.

@USEmbassyFrance is supporting U.S. travelers during these games, but our work continues year-round at Embassies and Consulates around the world. https://t.co/cwDDHsaPUP
What does @TeamUSA think about when they hear the national anthem? 🎶 🇺🇸 🥇 We asked athletes ahead of the #Paris2024 Olympic and Paralympic games. https://t.co/MlGpbGvTGu

Before you travel, make sure you check https://t.co/yR0YJrGtYg to access country-specific alerts and advisories that could affect your plans.

#TravelSmartFromTheStart https://t.co/mErGtojmqN

Throughout #AUSMIN, The U.S. and Australia discussed threats to our shared vision of a free and open Indo‑Pacific. Together we’re advancing a stable, peaceful, and prosperous region, where sovereignty and international law are respected, where human rights are protected. https://t.co/8RoQk4KsvD
At the heart of our work in the Indo-Pacific is our Alliance with Australia. It is an anchor for peace and prosperity in the Indo-Pacific and around the world. https://t.co/Gl3SaTY87w

Sign up for the Smart Traveler Enrollment Program (STEP) to get up-to-date safety and security information in the event of an emergency abroad. #TravelSmartFromTheStart https://t.co/4m3cQyptBW https://t.co/ieReXaXgMb

.@SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with @SecDef Austin, Australian Foreign Minister @SenatorWong, and Australian Deputy Prime Minister and Defense Minister @RichardMarlesMP in Annapolis, Maryland. https://t.co/WaxziKvu56  https://t.co/8uNvQXvCO7

.@SecBlinken participates in the Australia-U.S. Ministerial Consultations (AUSMIN) with @SecDef Austin, Australian Foreign Minister @SenatorWong, and Australian Deputy Prime Minister and Defense Minister @RichardMarlesMP in Annapolis, Maryland. https://t.co/3BFBdJ5J46

Planning a trip abroad? Make sure you review the Travel Advisories for your intended destination. You can see the world at a glance on our interactive map. 
Learn more: https://t.co/ZUIfgAmxZj

#TravelSmartFromTheStart https://t.co/AQRM0ew59c

.@StateDeptSpox recaps @SecBlinken’s diplomatic engagements with counterparts in the Middle East and his message that all parties take steps to refrain from escalation. The U.S. sees a ceasefire deal in Gaza as a crucial step in calming broader tensions. https://t.co/Tm3iBk7yNO

.@SecBlinken participates in a signing ceremony on countering foreign information manipulation and a joint communiqué on the U.S.-Australia Landsat Next 2030 International Partnership with Australian Foreign Minister @SenatorWong at the State Department. https://t.co/58V2fPEvqu

The United States is proud to partner with Australia in facing some of the most important strategic challenges of our time. @SecBlinken and @SecDef co-host @SenatorWong and @RichardMarlesMP in Annapolis for this week’s AUSMIN consultations. https://t.co/523fmU4WVl
If you’re an American living overseas, here is how you can exercise your right to vote to U.S. elections. Visit https://t.co/pOQikHRTUj for more details. https://t.co/rlV4FTsC5c

This week at State, @‌POTUS announces the release of Americans wrongly detained in Russia, and @‌SecBlinken continues travel to the Indo-Pacific with stops in Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, and Mongolia. https://t.co/batFKjMZwm

The Quad — a diplomatic partnership between Australia, India, Japan, and the U.S. — is committed to putting our collective resources, our collective strengths to work to benefit people across the Indo-Pacific region that we share. https://t.co/CAXW6niA4Y

For over 70 years – the U.S.-Japan Alliance has been the cornerstone for peace, for stability in the Indo-Pacific, and now beyond. And it’s helping make our own people more free, more secure, more prosperous. — @SecBlinken https://t.co/OsBBckPLjE

Over the last decade, nearly 7,200 young African leaders from Sub-Saharan Africa have set the stage for long-term engagement between the United States and Africa. This week, we welcomed the Mandela @WashFellowship cohort to Washington. #MWFCelebrates10 https://t.co/gJVJRyS9yt

Through trade and foreign direct investment in the Indo-Pacific, the U.S. is strengthening our relationships and ties, benefiting Americans and people across the region. “You don’t make investments unless you’re optimistic about where they’ll lead in the future.” - @SecBlinken https://t.co/xYtFx8mTMT

Despite Russia’s unjust war, Ukraine is forging ahead with its economic comeback. @SpecRepUkraine Pritzker shares more on Ukraine’s Path to Prosperity and her optimism about Ukraine’s economic future, following travel to Kyiv this week. https://t.co/ilD0ThaXvN
As part of our defense cooperation, the United States regularly participates in Mongolia-hosted peacekeeping and humanitarian relief exercises, including the annual Khaan Quest exercise.

Our alliances make our people safer. Today’s deal releasing unjustly detained prisoners from Russia was a feat of diplomacy and friendship. Germany, Poland, Slovenia, Norway, and Türkiye stood with us throughout tough, complex negotiations to achieve this outcome. https://t.co/g51NH7UUly
Earlier today, @SecBlinken participated in a joint press availability with Mongolian Foreign Minister Batmunkh from Ulaanbaatar. https://t.co/PIQTddsTU0

.@SecBlinken is visiting Mongolia today, an oasis for democracy in the region. Together, we’re enhancing security and Mongolia’s national sovereignty, expanding our economic ties, and strengthening democratic institutions. https://t.co/R4IpKdF9Py

One year ago, we created a new office dedicated to helping countries prepare for current and future health threats.

With 25 million lives saved since @PEPFAR’s inception and over 50 #GlobalHealthSecurity partners today, the world is on the path to a healthier future.

ASEAN is at the heart of the United States Indo-Pacific Strategy. Through our partnership, we’re elevating our work – together – to tackle the biggest challenges like cybersecurity, public health, and women’s empowerment. https://t.co/2dXpyNph3b
